listOfQuestions.question: Which Genetics and Heredity concept is described by this clue: A long DNA structure containing many genes?
Which Genetics and Heredity concept is described by this clue: A version of a gene?
Which Genetics and Heredity concept is described by this clue: The genetic makeup for a trait?
Which Genetics and Heredity concept is described by this clue: The observable expression of a trait?
Which Genetics and Heredity concept is described by this clue: An allele expressed when one copy is present?
Which Genetics and Heredity concept is described by this clue: An allele expressed when two copies are present?
Which Genetics and Heredity concept is described by this clue: Having two matching alleles for a gene?
Which Genetics and Heredity concept is described by this clue: Having two different alleles for a gene?
Which Genetics and Heredity concept is described by this clue: A change in DNA sequence?
Which Genetics and Heredity concept is described by this clue: The process of making proteins from genetic instructions?
Which Genetics and Heredity concept is described by this clue: Copying DNA information into RNA?
Which Genetics and Heredity concept is described by this clue: Building a protein using RNA instructions?
Which Genetics and Heredity concept is described by this clue: RNA that carries genetic instructions from DNA to ribosomes?
Which Genetics and Heredity concept is described by this clue: A diagram used to predict possible inherited traits?
Which Genetics and Heredity concept is described by this clue: An individual who has one recessive disease allele without showing the trait?
Which Genetics and Heredity concept is described by this clue: A three-base RNA sequence that specifies an amino acid or stop signal?
Which Genetics and Heredity concept is described by this clue: All genetic material in an organism?
Which Genetics and Heredity concept is described by this clue: Differences in DNA among individuals?
Which Genetics and Heredity concept is described by this clue: A molecule that stores hereditary instructions?
Which Genetics and Heredity concept is described by this clue: A DNA segment that influences a trait or product?
